meta.title: A Walk Around The S4x19 Welcome Party
meta.description: Join Dale as he shows you what happens at the Welcome Party after the first day of S4x19. See the cigar rollers, truck bars, dominos, game room, smores, the Miami Beach Botanical Gardens and of course the death star fire pit.
